notes:
Game periodically brought up the "This program has hung, and will now close" dialogue box when unfocused for random periods of time, even during the downloading process before choosing a character/server. I tried what other people have recommended, by adding the configuration in Engine.ini. (I used Config 3 from https://github.com/AlteriaX/WuWa-Configs/) But it changed nothing other than adding a new hung message. In addition, keeping the downloading screen open to keep it focused, before selecting a character started giving texture errors: https://cdn.imgchest.com/files/22b4fac41fdc.jpg


Game still freezes on a black screen after choosing a character, despite RT being off via Engine.ini
